description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a formal suit with a distinctive, irregular pattern. The suit jacket is tailored and features a lapel, with one sleeve appearing unusually extended and distorted. The figure has short, neatly styled hair and a clean-shaven face, giving a professional appearance. The pants are loose-fitting and match the jacket, while the shoes are formal and polished. The figure's arms are positioned outward, with one arm extended straight and the other bent at the elbow. The overall appearance suggests a business or formal context, but the unusual arm geometry gives the figure an abstract or stylized quality.
description: A male adult in a formal patterned suit with short hair and formal shoes, featuring an unusually extended arm and a professional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suit's lapel, the figure's facial features, and both arms extended outward, with the right arm appearing abnormally long.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extreme extension of the right arm and the profile of the face and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit, the back of the head, and the asymmetry in the arm positions.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the left arm bent at the elbow and the right arm's unusual extension, as well as the side profile of the face and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with a tailored jacket and matching trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
